description_long: This is a white athletic soccer cleat with three blue stripes along the side, characteristic of Adidas branding. The upper is made of synthetic leather with a glossy finish, featuring perforations near the heel for breathability and a reinforced toe area for durability. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces and a blue tongue accent. The sole is equipped with multiple blue studs designed for traction on grass or turf surfaces. The interior is padded and lined with a dark gray material for comfort and support. The Adidas logo is visible on the heel, and the overall condition appears pristine, with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A white and blue Adidas soccer cleat with synthetic leather, blue studs, and a glossy finish, featuring three blue stripes and a padded gray interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white toe, blue stripes on the side, and the lacing system with a blue tongue accent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the three blue Adidas stripes, blue studs, and the overall sleek profile of the shoe.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the Adidas logo on the heel, perforations for breathability, and the padded gray collar.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue stripes, blue studs, and the smooth, glossy finish of the synthetic upper.
attribute_logo: White Adidas logo on the heel, consisting of three diagonal stripes and the word 'adidas'.
